raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The artifact's stated central thesis ('rationale diversity at decode time, not additional supervision, is the principal lever') is directly and explicitly reversed by the ablation conclusion in the final paragraph ('distillation stage, rather than decode-time aggregation, is the principal driver'), making thesis reconstruction a central concern for any substantive review.","R1.2":"A load-bearing logical contradiction spans the full artifact: the abstract elevates inference-time diversity as the mechanism of interest while explicitly excluding 'additional supervision,' yet the ablation section attributes ~70% of reported gains to the rationale-distillation fine-tuning stage, which is additional supervision. This is the most structurally critical flaw regardless of review intent.","R1.3":"The empirical evidence (single-sample post-distillation accuracy of 61.8% exceeds K=20 voting-only 60.4% on A-OKVQA; 48.1% vs 44.7% on CLEVRER) is misaligned with the abstract's framing of decode-time diversity as the principal lever, making evidence-to-claim correspondence a central active dimension."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Are you looking for feedback on writing quality and style, or on whether the logical claims and experimental evidence within the text are internally consistent with each other?"}

rationale.R1.1: The artifact's stated central thesis ('rationale diversity at decode time, not additional supervision, is the principal lever') is directly and explicitly reversed by the ablation conclusion in the final paragraph ('distillation stage, rather than decode-time aggregation, is the principal driver'), making thesis reconstruction a central concern for any substantive review.
rationale.R1.2: A load-bearing logical contradiction spans the full artifact: the abstract elevates inference-time diversity as the mechanism of interest while explicitly excluding 'additional supervision,' yet the ablation section attributes ~70% of reported gains to the rationale-distillation fine-tuning stage, which is additional supervision. This is the most structurally critical flaw regardless of review intent.
rationale.R1.3: The empirical evidence (single-sample post-distillation accuracy of 61.8% exceeds K=20 voting-only 60.4% on A-OKVQA; 48.1% vs 44.7% on CLEVRER) is misaligned with the abstract's framing of decode-time diversity as the principal lever, making evidence-to-claim correspondence a central active dimension.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you looking for feedback on writing quality and style, or on whether the logical claims and experimental evidence within the text are internally consistent with each other?
